vitals.terrain: Forest roads, bog bridges, open meadows, deciduous and coniferous forests

course_description.overview: Cykelvasan is the Nordic region's largest mountain bike race, following the historic route of Sweden's legendary Vasaloppet cross-country ski race. The primary 96 km route starts in Sälen and descends to Mora, passing all classic Vasaloppet checkpoints through scenic Scandinavian terrain.

key_segments.name: Sälen to Oxberg
key_segments.description: Initial section from the start in Sälen through forest roads toward the first major checkpoint

key_segments.name: Oxberg to Hökberg
key_segments.description: Hilly terrain around Oxberg lake, through genuine summer pastures and mixed forests

key_segments.name: Hökberg to Eldris
key_segments.description: Continuation through deciduous and coniferous forests with classic Vasaloppet checkpoint

key_segments.name: Eldris to Mora
key_segments.description: Final descent through bright pine forests and meadows to the finish portal in Mora

course_description.difficulty_narrative: The race combines endurance and technical skill, featuring forest roads, wooden bog bridges, and open meadows. Multiple distance options (30 km, 45 km, 96 km) accommodate varying fitness levels, from casual family riders to elite competitors.

logistics.getting_there: Located in central Sweden between Sälen and Mora. Sälen is a established ski resort destination with regional accessibility.
logistics.accommodation: SkiStar Lodge Lindvallen offers on-site lodging near the Vasaloppet Arena. The event runs during Vasaloppet's Summer Week (August 3-9, 2026) with family-oriented activities and dining options.
logistics.registration_details: Registration for Cykelvasan 2026 is open. Multiple race categories available: Cykelvasan 90 (96 km competitive), Cykelvasan Öppet Spår (96 km non-competitive), Cykelvasan 45 (45 km from Oxberg), and Cykelvasan 30 (32 km family-friendly from Oxberg).
logistics.bike_logistics: Mountain bikes recommended but regular bikes acceptable. Participants should prepare for forest roads and bog terrain.
logistics.local_considerations: Part of a week-long festival with cycling clinics, downhill courses, mountain adventures, and entertainment. Experium adventure center nearby offers water park, bowling, and spa facilities.

final_verdict.one_liner: A historic, scenic Nordic mountain bike experience that honors Sweden's legendary Vasaloppet legacy with accessible distance options for all skill levels.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Cyclists seeking a meaningful endurance challenge with cultural significance, families wanting to experience the Vasaloppet route by bike, and riders interested in Scandinavian cycling heritage. Suitable for both competitive racers and recreational riders.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes, particularly for those valuing historical significance and scenic beauty. The festival atmosphere, multiple distance options, and family-friendly programming add value beyond the race itself. Best suited for summer vacation planning in Sweden.
pro_tips: Register early as the Nordic region's largest MTB race attracts significant participation
Consider the shorter 30 km or 45 km options if 96 km feels overwhelming—all routes pass classic Vasaloppet checkpoints
Plan a full week at Lindvallen to enjoy the Vasaloppet Summer Week activities and maximize the experience
Bring a mountain bike for optimal performance on bog bridges and forest terrain, though regular bikes are permitted

youtube_data.search_query: Cykelvasan gran fondo cycling Sälen to Mora

videos.title: Vasaloppet på cykel
videos.description:
Phooo what a day ❄️❄️❄️
First sunday in March, we, here in Sweden have this super big ski race Vasaloppet. 90km race from Sälen to Mora.
We dont do ski we do bike so we had fun here on our own turf, 90km Vasaloppet on bike.
The problem wasnt the 90km the problem was the crazy wet cold but we finaly came home in one pice...
...no amputation... so far ✌🏻😎
